faqs.question: Is NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences good in terms of placements?
faqs.answer:
NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences placements 2023, a total of 44 UG 4-years and 78 PG 2-years students were placed in reputed companies. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-years and PG 2-years students during NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences placements 2023 was INR 2.64 LPA and INR 3.62 LPA, respectively. college_info.intro: The NGSMIPS offers a range of popular programs, including PhD, DPharma, MPharma, BPharma, and PharmD, all within the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. Specializations at the institute include M.Pharma specialisations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, and Quality Assurance. All the courses by the institute are offered in a full-time mode. Pharm D is the flagship course of 6 Years course inclusive of 1-year Internship. Details about NGSMIPS popular programmes are provided below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed their class 12 with at least 45% marks in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics with English as one of the subjects and completed 17 years of age as on Dec 31 if the admission year are eligible to apply for the course. The admission criteria for NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Science BPharma is merit-based.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Placements, infrastructure, and quality of teaching is good. Overall its good.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not available before. Now, there are many companies looking and offering us opportunities for work. Students do internships in hospital pharmacies and other companies. There is a placement officer with whom we have to communicate after our studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available to each and every student by filling out a form. Labs are very well-equipped with chemicals and equipment. Classrooms are fitted with microphones and projectors. The library is very well-equipped with lots of benches and desks for studying and other work. There are newspaper articles and many books.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I like the classrooms of the college which are good.

review_content.Placements: For M.Pharma students in the final year, the placements begin. Companies like Iqvia, Covance, Biocon, and pharma leaf companies visit for placements. The highest package given is 4 LPA by Biocon. Not all the students will be placed but almost 60% of the students from ADEPT will be placed by the college placements. I am planning to work for men in the pharma sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, I do stay at the hostel. a satisfactory and cool place, which made my heart happy. The pharmacy hostel is a two-shared room with attached washrooms. The hostel is kept clean and it's cleaned every day. The hostel has a beautiful mess and good hygiene. Students are given a Wi-Fi facility. Good-cleaning aunties and kind wardens are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is about 40%–50% based on the previous batch. Apollo Pharmacy provides internships for students, and it hires students after they complete their internships. A salary package of 2 LPA is provided by Apollo. A student with a diploma in pharmacy can work as a pharmacist, a medical representative, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. Labs are well equipped with the necessary requirements. Free Wi-Fi is provided for all students. There is a huge library from which students can borrow books for reference. They also provide the textbooks required for the course. We should pay Rs. 1000 for 2 years. Later, the books can be returned. The hostel is situated at the university. The food is good. Free medical facilities are provided by KS Hegde Hospital. Two students can stay in a room. Each room has an attached bathroom, separate cupboards, a study table, a chair, and cots. The hostel fee is Rs. 96,000. There is a caution deposit of Rs. 2,000 in the first year. The caution deposit will be returned when you move out of the hostel permanently.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good but hostel facilities are not that great.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not as promised by the college. They say that they provide good placements. Nothing is provided in the college. As a student, I applied for a job and I still got nothing. The college does not provide any placements, but we need to find one. We have a high demand for Pharmacy in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is not great. Classrooms are old enough. Wi-Fi is great in some places. The library is good and peaceful. The cafeteria is not that great. Uniform colors are not good. Bus facilities are good. They have bus facilities to almost all places in the city.

admission_overview.college_name: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application

paragraphs: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissionis based on merit of the qualifying exam.NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciencesoffers four courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and doctoral levels. The college offers courses under theDepartment of Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacy Practice, Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology & Teaching Hospital. Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria can apply online for admission through the official website.

NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissionstypically starts in themonth of April and ends in September, every year. Admission to most of the courses at the college is merit-based. Candidates, however, for all courses are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences. Check below popularNGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences coursesalong with theireligibility and selection criteria:
The candidates should pass in 10+2 with at least 45% marks in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics with English as one of the subjects.
Age:Minimum 17 years as of 31st December of the year of admission
Pass in DPharm course with at least 45% marks.
The candidates should pass the PUC/10+2 with science subjects
Age:Minimum 17 years as of 31st December of the year of admission
Pharm D ( Post Baccalaureate)
The candidates should pass in B.Pharm from an institution approved by the PCI.

NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences course admissions 2025for all of its courses are based on merit secured in the qualifying exam. Check below the complete NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admission process:Step 1: Application Process

The mode of application is online. Interested candidates have to submit an admission query form available on the official website. On receipt of the same, the Admission Section will guide the students through the process of registration and admission.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences courses is based on merit-secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants must pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostellers are provided with a cot, cupboard, study table and chair. Every hostel has solar water heaters, WiFi facility, common telephone, TV room, reading room, visitors lounge, water coolers, generators, 24x7 security and surveillance cameras. AC rooms are available in some of the hostels. The hostels also have facilities for indoor and outdoor games.
facilities: Library: The institute has a well-stocked library with a large floor area of 3230 sq. ft. It has a rich collection of Printed Books, Back Volumes, W.H.O Publications and CD-ROM. The Library subscribes to National and International journals in print and e-journals and is also a member of the HELINET consortium, DELNET and UpToDate: Evidence-Based Medical decision support service resource. The Library is fully automated with Easylib web version software (ILMS) and computerized through a Bar-coding system. It is also well protected with a fire extinguisher and CCTV surveillance system

Gym: The air-conditioned multi Gymnasium housed in a 5500 sq. ft building is kept open from 6 am to 10 pm for the benefit of students and hostellers. The services of 3 professionally trained instructors are available. Equipment consists of Treadmills, elliptical trainers, exercise bikes, rowing machines and a full-fledged multi-gym.
Shuttle Service: A fleet of buses and vans are maintained on the campus to provide transport facilities to the students and staff, free of cost.
Hospital/Medical Facilities: Students can avail of medical and dental treatment at the 1000-bed multispecialty Justice KS Hegde Charitable Hospital and the A B Shetty Dental College Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, infrastructure, and quality of teaching is good. Overall its good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available to each and every student by filling out a form. Labs are very well-equipped with chemicals and equipment. Classrooms are fitted with microphones and projectors. The library is very well-equipped with lots of benches and desks for studying and other work. There are newspaper articles and many books.

reviews.review_heading: I like the classrooms of the college which are good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, I do stay at the hostel. a satisfactory and cool place, which made my heart happy. The pharmacy hostel is a two-shared room with attached washrooms. The hostel is kept clean and it's cleaned every day. The hostel has a beautiful mess and good hygiene. Students are given a Wi-Fi facility. Good-cleaning aunties and kind wardens are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. Labs are well equipped with the necessary requirements. Free Wi-Fi is provided for all students. There is a huge library from which students can borrow books for reference. They also provide the textbooks required for the course. We should pay Rs. 1000 for 2 years. Later, the books can be returned. The hostel is situated at the university. The food is good. Free medical facilities are provided by KS ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but hostel facilities are not that great.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is not great. Classrooms are old enough. Wi-Fi is great in some places. The library is good and peaceful. The cafeteria is not that great. Uniform colors are not good. Bus facilities are good. They have bus facilities to almost all places in the city.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Goa College of Pharmacy offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Pharma. Goa College of Pharmacy courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Goa College of Pharmacy courses stands around INR 1,04,000 to 3,04,000.

review_content.Placements: Top roles in our course allow us to be appointed as pharmacists in hospitals and reputed pharmacies. We can also open our own pharmacy to educate the public on disease spread and raise awareness about taking preventive measures during pandemics like COVID-19, typhoid, and malaria.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is a small place with benches and chairs, containing books related to pharmacy and many old papers. Our labs are well-maintained, and the assistants are very helpful to the students. The classrooms are very spacious and equipped with projectors for presentations.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best place to get good knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Students in our college receive internships in various industries for experience, and students are placed based on merit. Of course, the better you perform, the more likely you are to be selected by renowned companies such as Cipla, Abbott, Pfizer, and others. Freshers usually get a salary package of Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall structure of our college is good. All the places are clean. Students have all the facilities like Wi-Fi for students. Each classroom has a projector. Some labs are pretty good and clean. Food in the canteen is at a reasonable rate. They have good equipment for the required courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: I had a really very good college experience.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements for our batch. The college should really try to provide placements as there are two colleges in Goa and most of the pharma companies located are in Goa only. But a lot of Goans pharma graduates struggle to get jobs in Goa. Overall, our college should really try to improve placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Labs were also in good condition. I really liked the atmosphere of our college. But there are scopes of improvement. Time spent in pharmacognosy labs was really good, and we spent a lot of time. The HOD was friendly.

reviews.review_text: The college was fully facilitated. Classrooms were clean and well-maintained. The library was fully equipped with computers and books for students. The academic infrastructure includes good laboratories with equipment and chemicals, classrooms, computer labs, etc. The hostel infrastructure includes clean and hygienic rooms, food, Wi-Fi facilities, sports, a gym, etc.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present on the campus, but speed is very slow. Labs and classrooms are good and well organized by staff. library contains all types of books. The hostel infrastructure is very poor; no sports are available. Mess food is just okay; medical or hospital services are available in the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: A short and complete review of Sunder Deep College.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure in the college and good facilities for students are available in our course. Free Wi-Fi facility; good and big labs; classrooms are very big and structured. The hostel is also good, and the canteen provides good food to students, and sports competitions are organised.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good campus area and environment, average faculty, and average course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was quite good. It was open and full of greenery. But the building of the pharmacy college was not so good. Rooms in our college were average. Rooms were spacious with good ventilation. Labs were not good. There were many things to improve in labs.

reviews.review_heading: I can't recommend this college. Management is the worse.
reviews.review_text: Lifts do not work properly. They don't allow us to play with facilities. Good labs are there as they are well managed but not properly. Security is average. Library’s experience is average. They charge too much in the name of sports. They do not think for students.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure, and high-quality study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities like canteen, mess, hostel, free Wi-Fi, etc. The infrastructure and facilities in our college are great. All the benches, seats, and classrooms are in good condition, whatever facilities a law student needs are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is have top faculty, top management, top infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college have Wi-Fi based campus, lab are good in all banches. There are girls or boys hostel speciality with Wi-Fi and canteen based campus with medical and sports ground. Sunderdeep Group of Institutions provide you best technical lab with all equipment. Sunderdeep Group of Institutions is best college in Ghaziabad with best infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: I was a day-scholar. I visited the boys' hostel a lot of times during sessional exams. The hostel surrounding was always very peaceful with positive vibes. Qualified and helpful faculty members are available in this college. The canteen is good to have lunch. A huge playground is available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a big hostel in our college, which is separate for boys and girls. Big rooms, a clean corridor and washroom and a big ground are provided in the hostel. There is a big hostel mess in the hostel, and the food quality is also good. Food taste is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: Although I was a day scholar, I visited the boys' hostel a lot during the sessional exams. The surrounding of the hostel is always very peaceful. I wished that I wasn't a day scholar and lived in the hostel. The college facilities are beyond the mark. As this college is already approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), it is responsible for the proper infrastructure and facilities. The college has the best infrastructure and facilities compared to other Delhi/NCR colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers and staff members are well-educated and supportive, and labs are in good condition.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are well-designed and clean, and conditions are also very good. Healthy food is provided by the hostel and from the canteen also. Many sports are played on the campus, and tournaments are conducted every year between other departments. Hostels give the highest facilities to students with high security.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good medical college in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are better. Wi-Fi is available in all labs. The classrooms are good and clean. The library provides all the required books. The food available in mess and canteen is of the best quality and prepared with proper hygiene. Sports and games and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sunder Deep Pharmacy College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. The hostel facility is very good, very neat and clean. Hostel staff members are quite good and make sure that they take proper care of the safety of their students. The library provides wanted information and is helpful for a professional career. The food served is up to the mark. There is a vast platform for sports and games. So it depends on students to what extent they use it.

Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. S. Nijalingappa Medical College and HSK Hospital and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 4.6 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.5 for Campus Life, 5 for Placements, 4.5 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: S. Nijalingappa Medical College and HSK Hospital and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with a swimming pool and a badminton court.

content.Placements: It is an excellent college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostels are well-maintained and hygienic. Cleanliness is a top priority in safe and sterilized hospitals. Good vegetarian food is provided in hostels, with a variety of dishes. Our college has good facilities like a badminton court, etc.
content.Faculty: Our college has excellent teachers. They help students learn about the clinical and moral aspects of life. They are supportive and knowledgeable.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty, good lab, and excellent environment.

content.Placements: In our college, the average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college were great. We had Wi-Fi in the hostel to use for our project and acceptable usage. The lab was good and the lab equipment was good. The canteen facilities were very good and natural food was served to students in the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were helpful to us to study for exams. They visit us at the institution and in the industry for the course. They were very flexible and the pass percentage for the semester was 35%. The average pass percentage was 50%. The course was good and teachers were good at handling students.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: My college life and the college are the best.

review_content.Placements: Seventy-five students are allotted every year, and almost every student gets placement in higher college according to their PG scores and higher department. Every student does an internship as it is compulsory. Roles provided include Ayurveda doctor, Ayurvedic medical officer (AMO), community health officer (CHO), professor, and nutritionist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is the best, as it is equipped with Wi-Fi, labs for every particular subject, and a library well-equipped with lots of books. Our college is soon going to develop hostels for 250 seats for boys and girls in the coming three years. This will help students in every sector.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: At a glance: Government Ayurvedic College, Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: 75 students were placed in every batch. This number increases or decreases each year. Almost every student gets placement in higher colleges according to their PG scores in higher departments. Top roles include practice as an Ayurvedic doctor, Ayurvedic Medical Officer (AMO), Community Health Officer (CHO), professor in higher institutes of Ayurveda, and nutritionist. There are many more options, and this criteria is expanding in Ayurveda.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our entire college infrastructure is excellent. It provides labs for each particular subject, and there are enough classrooms for each year's students. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The library is well-equipped with lots of books, and the college is soon developing Wi-Fi facilities. Our college is planning to develop a hostel for about 250 seats for boys and girls in the coming year. Medical facilities are available in our hospital since it is a medical college. Games and sports are organized every year, helping students develop their skills in extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with Good infrasturce.

review_content.Placements: Every year there are 75 students enrolled in the course, There is no placement in the college as it is medical college. YOU GOT admission through NEET exam in this college and as this is medical college so it only provide internship in it's own hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility but There are rooms that are available near college and bus is available for 1 st year student, canteen is also there in the hostel also have it's own Hospital and the campus of the college is well built and there is football court, volleyball court badminton court and gym in the college.

content.Placements: This is a medical degree, so you will not get a package like engineering. However, we have a lot of career opportunities; we can prepare for government exams like CHO, AMO, Professor, etc., or we can run our own clinic after completing UG. There are many more opportunities, such as running your own pharmaceutical company too.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is superb; it has Wi-Fi all over the campus. The library is fully digitalized, and classrooms have projectors. description: AIIMS, Rajkot cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS, Rajkot NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 7712 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS, Rajkot MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7712 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11574 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS, Rajkot accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS, Rajkot INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 587 to 28705 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MS in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, with a lowest cutoff rank of 587. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Anatomy, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MS in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, MD in Paediatrics and MD in Radiation Oncology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 587, 745 and 1539, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Datia.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement offered in my course. Students can go through PG degrees, internships, and government jobs. The highest package offered is about 12 - 16 LPA. The average package is around 8 LPA - 12 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA - 6 LPA. There are no recruitment companies offered in my course. There is a hospital that provides jobs to MBBS students. Almost all students get internships, but not in companies instead in hospitals. There are top roles offered after completing BE, MBBS, and PG degrees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-furnished. Labs are well-lightened and clean. Classrooms in almost all the departments are in superb condition and all the learning equipment is present in the college. There is the average quality of food available in the mess and the canteen. Medical facilities are super in my hostel. Sports and games culture is very rapidly growing in this phase.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Datia Medical College has good infrastructure and a drama center.

review_content.Placements: Students did not get placed in our college in the UG course in which our college will not hire any type of companies and anything we get posted in a hospital after getting a college. After UG completion, we get a salary of R. 50,000 for an MBBS degree. After PG, the salary is Rs. 80,000 per month. For those who are doing the JR shipping and SR, the salary is around Rs. 80,000 to 1,00,00 per month according to their subject. The highest role is a gynaecologist to get the highest amount of money. After that, it comes to ortho.
review_content.Infrastructure: We get the best libraries. There is a lab technician and everything in our class. There are the best practicals. In the hostel, there are no any kind of facilities in the hostel. They are very underrated.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: GMC Datiya best review ever.

review_content.Placements: Placement: Almost all the students are placed in our college in different hospitals and government and private hospitals. The highest and the lowest packages are not found because the placement is not by the companies; it is by choice. No companies visit the college. Almost all students do their internship in the college hospital. The role in our course is to treat patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities: In our college campus, many facilities are provided, like college Wi-Fi. Labs are very clean, and regular cleaning occurs in the labs. The classrooms are fully furnished with AC and smart boards, and a library with a huge number of books is present on the campus. In our hostel, facilities are provided, such as a bed, one almirah, and one fridge in each building. Every building has a night and day-time guard available for safety purposes. The food quality in our mess is very poor. A playground is also present.

individual_reviews.title: Data Medical College and Institute for excellence in medical sciences.

content.Placements: I am a 2024 batch student pursuing MBBS at this college. Most of the students after pursuing MBBS have either been selected for the junior residence programme or have cleared NEET PG and are pursuing PG courses. One year internship is mandatory in this course which provides on field experience for industry ready professionals.
content.Infrastructure: College is just opened in 2018 so overall infrastructure of the campus is quite new. Hostel infrastructure is new as well, and daily sweeping duty is assigned to the workers. Lift facility is another, but it is not functional. Hostel fees are very low. All the classrooms and labs are well-equipped with functional equipment.

After pursuing an MBBS, one can go for the MS or MD degree in various specialities.

reviews.review_heading: College has beautiful and modern infrastructure, with a secure career.
reviews.review_text: The college was established in 2018. So all the buildings are new. There are different departments for the courses and subjects, and they are well-equipped with the required instruments and necessities. Hostels are also very good and clean, with a high occupancy of students. The canteen is present inside the college campus, which offers cost-friendly meals and other items.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Datia.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-furnished. Labs are well-lightened and clean. Classrooms in almost all the departments are in superb condition and all the learning equipment is present in the college. There is the average quality of food available in the mess and the canteen. Medical facilities are super in my hostel. Sports and games culture is very rapidly growing in this phase.

reviews.review_heading: Datia Medical College has good infrastructure and a drama center.
reviews.review_text: We get the best libraries. There is a lab technician and everything in our class. There are the best practicals. In the hostel, there are no any kind of facilities in the hostel. They are very underrated.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Datiya best review ever.
reviews.review_text: Facilities: In our college campus, many facilities are provided, like college Wi-Fi. Labs are very clean, and regular cleaning occurs in the labs. The classrooms are fully furnished with AC and smart boards, and a library with a huge number of books is present on the campus. In our hostel, facilities are provided, such as a bed, one almirah, and one fridge in each building. Every building has a night and day-time guard available for safety purposes. The food quality in our mess is very poor. A p...

reviews.review_heading: The college has average infrastructure with good teachers and a secured hospital.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with all modern facilities like lecture theatres, a library, sports areas, labs, and a tertiary care hospital. The college library has an AC seating hall with a capacity exceeding 500, with all updated books and journals. The labs are provided with all modern resources and infrastructure. The college campus is secured and eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Professor and all faculty are so great.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, but labs are much better. In our lecture theatre, there are many desks that are damaged, and sometimes we have to deal with seats. Hostels are much better than college buildings, and the mess of all colleges is the same. Our college's students are more involved in studies.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are really good and pay attention on student and their studies.
reviews.review_text: Hostel's infrastructure is really good compared to other government colleges. Faculty members and all departments are very serious and dedicated towards their work. Classes are properly held and on schedule. Teachers are very supportive towards students and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement but not a good campus life. Nice faculty members who are really good for your MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Smart classrooms with projector and screen is present. There is a huge library which helps you to get any book related to your course. Mess food is not that  good, also there is no canteen but soon there will be a canteen as the work is going on.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good and well-equipped with Wi-Fi and lifts. Practical labs, library and lecture theatres are top-notch. The quality of the food served is not that good. The canteen is not available here. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are developing now as this is a new college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The college building is good. They provide hot water in winter. The watercoolers are available on all floors. Classrooms have proper ventilation. Elevators are available in all buildings. The library is good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: The curriculum & academics are good, but hostel facilities & extracurricular are bad.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very well established, and all facilities like water coolers and lifts in the main campus are fully functional. Labs of all departments one of the main, the DH hall, are also fully functional and well managed by the Anatomy department. The hostel is good enough for a person to survive there, and the attendance and maintenance of the hostel is good well managed by wardens.

faqs.answer: A:    On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, College of Veterinary & Animal Science - Rajasthan University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences has a rating of 5 on the basis of 1 reviews by Shiksha verified students.
faqs.question: Does College of Veterinary & Animal Science - Rajasthan University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Veterinary & Animal Science - Rajasthan University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Science. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as UG Diploma and BVSC. Whereas, at PG level, College of Veterinary & Animal Science - Rajasthan University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences offers courses such as MVSC.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rajasthan University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences

review_content.Placements: Internship is included in the course. After completing the 4-year course, we can get our degree only after completing the internship period. The stipend is about Rs.15,000- Rs. 17,000 salary per month for one year. For the internship, we have to visit various other universities during this period.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no annual functions as such in this college. Sports meets take place in both inter-class and inter-college, usually in February. Infrastructure of the college campus is quite nice, with an excellent library, but the canteen facilities are average. College locality is good, so rented rooms and PG accommodations are easily available, although the college hostel is also an option. There are no issues regarding vacant seats in the girls' hostel, but there are issues in the boys' hostel. For the college hostel, we need to complete the paperwork only once, so it's easy process.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. & A.H. - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great facilities and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 80% students were placed in our course. The highest package offered was of about 25,00,000 and the lowest about 4,00,000 with the average of about 16,00,000. Top recruiting companies are amul, horlicks, nestle. Mostly all of us got placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like classroom, labs are highly advanced with smart classes and infrastructure is also very good. We are provided with a good Wi-Fi connection and library has a great collection of books. Hostels are also in good condition. Food at mess is very delicious. We love enjoying our sports and cultural events.

reviews_list.review_title: Life in a mediocre medical college.

review_content.Placements: It's a medical course so nothing is fixed, the salary varies from hospital to hospital. 100% internships for every student and it's a compulsory The college offers roles such as junior president, senior president, and PG courses, along with clinical courses, which is a good thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are decent, neither good nor bad. Library is available, but the only con is it isn't available 24/7. Hostels are quite good, girls' hostel is shared by two people, and there's enough space for two people, geyser and water cooler facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In our college, all pass-out students get an internship within our own college hospital, which is the largest hospital in our district, for 1-year with a stipend of Rs. 30,000 per month. Our college has JRs, SRs, and PG in the non-clinical branches as of now and tutors also.
review_content.Infrastructure: All labs of respective subjects in MBBS are available in the college itself. It has a fully functioning library. A new central library is being built, and an auditorium is also being made. Lecture halls are also getting renovated in process.

description: Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26794 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26794 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26959 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 17127 to 143552. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Paediatrics, followed by MD in Microbiology and MD in Physiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 17127, 72935 and 143552, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 58007 for MBBS.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology with a closing cutoff rank of 9826 for the General AI category candidates.

overview_faqs.answer: Kanak Manjari Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is a well-known institution for D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Kanak Manjari Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences has a rating of 4.7 on the basis of reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: Kanak Manjari Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Most of the maximum students in our got placements. We got an average salary package of 3 LPA to 4 LPA. India's top brand companies. Most of the students at our college get internships. The top jobs in our college are medical coding and pharmacovigilance. The majority of students in our college are placed very well.
content.Infrastructure: We have facilities like a laboratory, a library, a classroom, Wi-Fi, everything is well mentioned. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, and sports games is good. We also have good Wi-Fi facilities, which you can use for free on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college, and I'm glad to be here.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Before COVID, the college was done with placements such as Sikkim, Goa, and all. You have to study hard and make your mind strong to achieve the goal. Almost 100% of students got internships from this course.
content.Infrastructure: It is a hexagonal-shaped building. The college campus is quite small, but it is enjoyable to walk around it during free periods. Having fun with friends and studying is also important. On the backside, there is a girls' hostel. It is very neat and clean. The canteen is also good.

NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, St. Stephen's College of Nursing ranks #3 under the category 'College'.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at St . Stephen's College of Nursing?

review_content.Placements: More than 90% of students got placed in reputed hospitals after the course. The salary is around Rs. 18,000 to 40,000 per month just after graduation. Apolo, Max Life Health Care, AIIMS Fortis, etc., visit the college. Nursing in charge, nursing superintendent, and nursing supervisor roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are historic and can be considered as a museum. Hostel facilities include an old building and edible food. There is no canteen. Labs are okay. The library is good. Phones are not allowed. There is Wi-Fi. Classrooms are so dull. There is good clinical exposure and practical skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: St. Stephen's Hospital College of Nursing is a trusted brand.

review_content.Placements: 50% seats admission eligibility criteria. The total fees for the General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) course at St. Stephen's College of Nursing in Delhi is 4,54,000 for 3 years and 6 months internship. I think 60% of students take internships here because of good facilities availability as compared to other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Institute library has approximately 5000 number of books. Institute has a girl hostel with total capacity of 400 beds, best quality as compared to other colleges. Medical facilities, sports, and games are best. All-time internet connection with Wi-Fi is available. Electricity faculty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: It was the best institute for nursing and I was satisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: I have passed out in 2016. Since I got a government job in 2017. I was also offered placements in hospitals in New Delhi. I currently have a salary package of about 7.5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs.10000 per month when my result was not declared. After I got registered, I got various job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the classrooms were quite large with a capacity of around 80 students. The library had many books. It was air-cooled and a Wi-Fi connection was also available. There was a central canteen which was also very clean and had many food options. The sports ground was also available. We occasionally play badminton and volleyball during our college sports day.

Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. review_content.Placements: Most students from this course got placed in well-known companies. The highest package offered is around 45 LPA and the lowest can be as low as 4 LPA. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My dream college is for education and not for placements.

content.Placements: I am from batch 2021-2025 Bachelor of Pharmacy. At the time, I am writing this review, only 1 company has come that is Symbiosis. But last year 2024 batch got very good placements. Students got placed in big companies like Nestled and other companies. Placements are average here.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good. Labs are excellent according to my thinking. In B. Pharmacy, labs play an important role than theory class. In VNS all types of labs like pharmaceuticals lab, pharmacology lab, and pharmacognosy lab are available with advanced tools like HPLC, FTIR, dissolution testing apparatus, US/VIS spectroscopy particle size analyser, muffle furnace, etc. For pharmacology, animal house is available. For PG students regular class is available with advanced experiential labs. A hostel facility is not available. The bus facility is available that services all over Bhopal.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All faculty members in our college are awesome.

content.Placements: About 62-70% of students are able to get placed in our college. The highest package in our college is 2 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 20,000 per month. There are so many courses in our college like B Pharma, D Pharma, B.Tech, etc. About 8 CGPA students got internships. The top roles offered in the college are secretary and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are best. It has all the chemical and practical related books and materials. The library is very useful for all students as they provide all the books that are important for our practical and subjects which we studied in our course. There is no hostel in our college. The canteen is the best in our college. We get good and affordable food. There are many sports and games in our college. There are international-level and college-level games also like football and basketball.

description: VNS Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the VNS Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

VNS Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 333861 and 1224500 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 333861, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 333861.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the VNS Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning, B.E. in Mining Engineering and B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 333861, 1209724, and 1224500, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: VNS Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My dream college is for education and not for placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. Labs are excellent according to my thinking. In B. Pharmacy, labs play an important role than theory class. In VNS all types of labs like pharmaceuticals lab, pharmacology lab, and pharmacognosy lab are available with advanced tools like HPLC, FTIR, dissolution testing apparatus, US/VIS spectroscopy particle size analyser, muffle furnace, etc. For pharmacology, animal house is available. For PG students regular class is available with advanced experiential labs. A hoste...

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members in our college are awesome.
reviews.review_text: Labs are best. It has all the chemical and practical related books and materials. The library is very useful for all students as they provide all the books that are important for our practical and subjects which we studied in our course. There is no hostel in our college. The canteen is the best in our college. We get good and affordable food. There are many sports and games in our college. There are international-level and college-level games also like football and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: College itself is average and infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: I must say, infrastructure is very good. There are lots of classrooms, libraries, canteens, difference types of labs, Wi-Fi in every corners of the campus and many more. When it comes to hostel, I would say it's okay, it's not that good but it's not bad either. The food quality is great and I love the taste.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VNS Group of Technology Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The lab and the classrooms are well-furnished and equipped with AC. The infrastructure is good with beautiful gardens. There are guards on the campus to provide security.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. There is a lot to study and learn.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The list of courses is very good. Students will get to learn good courses in this college. I have not stayed in the hostel but my friend stays in the hostel. The infrastructure of the college is in a very good location and it is also convenient for the students to come and go. There are many other co-curricular activities in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Mining Diploma from VNS College.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities and infrastructure are very good, and hostel rooms are clean. Every room has a study table and some other stuff. Every room has 2 students sharing. Mess food quality is quite decent. The hostel has Wi-Fi, and the library also has Wi-Fi. Hostel fees are 65,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VNS Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text:
AC labs, AC-provided rooms, well-furnished classes, good infrastructure, highly qualified teachers, well-developed buildings, etc. are there.
Natural and beautiful gardening area. Good guards are there. Maintained rules and regulations for students. Labs have full AC coverage and a good view to see our future brightly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing because they provide quality education and train students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides lots of facilities in the Department of Pharmacy. Facilities such as access to the computer lab and daily lab facilities for subjects like Pharmacology and Pharmaceutics are provided. Our college has a license for handling animals. There is a library and Wi-Fi infrastructure. The infrastructure is also good. However, our college does not provide hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college. If you really wants to save your future try other colleges.
reviews.review_text: For a student who does not afford much can take admission in this college because they only want a degree. I don't know about the hostel because I do not live in hostel here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good. I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good. Our college provides free Wi-Fi. It has good labs, large classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. The food served in the mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: VNS Group of Institutions has value for money.
reviews.review_text: On campus, there is no hostel available. There is a huge library where approximately 50 to 60 students can sit and study at one time. All types of books are available in the library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Our classrooms and labs are quite good. All types of equipment are available in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best colleges for pharmacy in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and classrooms is average. Laboratories are good for performing experiments and practicals. All the equipment is available in good condition. The auditorium and seminar halls are average. Various informative sessions are held in seminar halls. There are no hostels available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college in certain fields.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good on daily basis. Laboratories are well maintained with proper facilities. Equipment is also good in this college. Classrooms are well furnished. The canteen facilities are not good, and the food quality is average. Sports and games are held regularly.

reviews.review_heading: I had a good college experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are pretty good in the CSE department. VNS has at least 150 computers. The hostel is quite far from college, but it is not a downside as they provide comfortable bus facilities from college to your place. The college is pretty equipped with essential necessities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely it is the worst college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the worst infrastructure I have ever seen. It has a poor library and a pathetic and unhygienic canteen facility. Labs are available just for namesake, and they don't have proper equipment and materials. Everything is outdated in labs.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Travancore Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    Travancore Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 4.75 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Travancore Medical College provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Travancore Medical College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers MBBS courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MD and MS. The Travancore Medical College course fee ranges between INR 33,69,186 to 55,49,244.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students enrolled in my batch. The tuition fee is around 9 Lacs, and the miscellaneous fee, including hostel fee and security fee, is around 1.5 Lacs. There is a 1-year internship program after 4.5 years of the course. More than 50 percent of students get the internship program.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hospital is really nice. The lecture halls are spacious, with skill labs available in the college along with subject-based labs. The hostel provides all the basic necessities. The food quality of the mess is average. Sports and games programs are also organized in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and education.

review_content.Placements: Students of our batch complete their course in 4 years and start their internships in the 5th year. Students have to do 1-year internships which provide one of the best experiences in their life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in the hostel are average. The quality of food served in the mess is above average. It serves both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are the best as it is a medical college. Sports and games are conducted by the Kerala University of Health and Science.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. They have done post-graduation and the majority of them are youngsters. They are supportive and helpful in all situations. Exams are conducted by KUHS and are difficult. Students have to prepare well to face any examinations.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My medical experience in TMC.

content.Placements: Most of the students go for further studies, while the rest work in the hospital owned by the college or get placed in different hospitals in India and Kerala. The final year is for an internship in the hospital itself, where the students learn firsthand how to deal with patients.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a good hostel for both boys and girls with decent infrastructure and daily cleaning. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and are spacious. The library has a lot of books, and most students can be found there referring to the books after college hours.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In short, anyone who wants a studious life and has little to no college life can choose this college

content.Placements: Each of the batches holds 150 students. The college offers various courses like MBBS, BDS, BLT, Optometry, etc. Also, about the staff, they are mostly good, but some are not at all cooperative. The fee for the MBBS course is about 7 lakhs, and the special fee for the first year is about 40,000, but for the following years, the special fee is less than that. The MBBS course is 5.5 years, with house surgency in the last year.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a library with AC and proper ventilation. The library has a variety of books, and all the essential books required are present. The college has an internet cafe with proper equipment. The college also has a well-equipped laboratory for various subjects. The classrooms are very average as there is no AC and no proper ventilation, which causes increased humidity and makes it impossible to sit through during the summer. The hostel is also average, with the mess food being the worst.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hospital is really nice. The lecture halls are spacious, with skill labs available in the college along with subject-based labs. The hostel provides all the basic necessities. The food quality of the mess is average. Sports and games programs are also organized in the college.

individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and education.

content.Placements: Students of our batch complete their course in 4 years and start their internships in the 5th year. Students have to do 1-year internships which provide one of the best experiences in their life.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in the hostel are average. The quality of food served in the mess is above average. It serves both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are the best as it is a medical college. Sports and games are conducted by the Kerala University of Health and Science.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable. They have done post-graduation and the majority of them are youngsters. They are supportive and helpful in all situations. Exams are conducted by KUHS and are difficult. Students have to prepare well to face any examinations.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life of a medico in TMC in 2025.

content.Placements: All students are placed. The top pay is 30000 per month. The course is for 6 years after which we do internship for 1 year and we get paid. Many departments are working in this medical college and they are very efficient and good. The reputation of the institution is very high.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are very good and is satisfactory. There is excellent library service and reading rooms. There is WiFi facilities also available. The infrastructure is very efficient and properly maintained. The hostel life is okay with good food.

reviews.review_heading: My medical experience in TMC.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good hostel for both boys and girls with decent infrastructure and daily cleaning. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and are spacious. The library has a lot of books, and most students can be found there referring to the books after college hours.

reviews.review_heading: In short, anyone who wants a studious life and has little to no college life can choose this college
reviews.review_text: The college has a library with AC and proper ventilation. The library has a variety of books, and all the essential books required are present. The college has an internet cafe with proper equipment. The college also has a well-equipped laboratory for various subjects. The classrooms are very average as there is no AC and no proper ventilation, which causes increased humidity and makes it impossible to sit through during the summer. The hostel is also average, with the mess food being the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hospital is really nice. The lecture halls are spacious, with skill labs available in the college along with subject-based labs. The hostel provides all the basic necessities. The food quality of the mess is average. Sports and games programs are also organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members and education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the hostel are average. The quality of food served in the mess is above average. It serves both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are the best as it is a medical college. Sports and games are conducted by the Kerala University of Health and Science.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a medico in TMC in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are very good and is satisfactory. There is excellent library service and reading rooms. There is WiFi facilities also available. The infrastructure is very efficient and properly maintained. The hostel life is okay with good food.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is the best here. Labs are good in my department, classrooms are equipped with LED projectors. Library has many books related to medical science. Food quality is good in the hostel. Canteen is cashless and there is a medicine room for students. 1 sports tournament is held once a year.

reviews.review_heading: It has bad infrastructure and food. No campus life.
reviews.review_text: The old buildings are painted partially every year. The rooms for freshers are the best ones. As you get passed out every year, the quality of the rooms decreases. The rooms in the topmost are painted just once, with the patterns of paint visible.

review_content.Placements: After completing MBBS, students can join as junior residents in medical colleges or as medical officers in PHC, CHC, etc. Students can go for post-graduation in different specialties such as medicine, dermatology, general surgery, orthopedics, OBG, pediatrics, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a government medical college. We have to give the NEET exam and score marks.

review_content.Placements: There are basically a hundred students in each batch. The internship is offered to every student who passes their final year with a stipend that ranges from Rs. 12,000-15,000 per month as per government rules. Students are placed in a district hospital in their different branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every class or lecture theatre has a projector and ACs. The library is AC. There are so many labs, grounds, and a canteen. Sports complex is going to be made soon where we can play many games. A badminton court is also available. There are many senior residences, junior residences, and non-PG residences.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: It is an MBBS course, so most of the students prepare for PG, and get their selections. It includes internships which also provide a stipend for expenses. After the MBBS course, there is a service bond of 2 years, which offers the grade pay.

description: Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17521 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 17521 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17967 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 69986 to 148275. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD/ MS in Anatomy. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 69986 and 148275, respectively.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 182598.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College, Shahjahanpur cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 19397 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 21201 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

college_info.college_name: Pushpagiri College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pushpagiri College of Pharmacy offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Pushpagiri College of Pharmacy offers M.Pharma. The fees for Pushpagiri College of Pharmacy courses range between INR 4,30,000 to 11,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My personal opinion about my college.

review_content.Placements: The number of students who got placed through campus recruitment is very few. Though campus placement assistance is provided, but companies coming for recruitment are less. The percentage of students getting placed is 30%. They get good salary packages as beginners. The college has a tie-up with some pharma companies. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sunpharma, etc. Internships are provided at the management-owned medical college hospital. Top roles offered in the course are clinical pharmacist, clinical research associate, pharmacovigilance, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College experience at Pushpagiri.

review_content.Placements: Placements are relatively fewer. Placements for Pharmaceutical companies and industries are very limited. Placements for hospital and retail pharmacy or drug stores come very often. The placement cell is getting more active and has had more placements and job offers recently. Internships are provided.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the college, but there is no such facility in the girls' hostel. Laboratories are moderately equipped, but there is a need for more improvement. The library is well-equipped with reference and standard textbooks. Mess is average during my period of study, but has improved now.
